title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Landmark Books Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Landmark Books Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books Advisory Limited in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books Advisory Limited:
Landmark Books Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books Advisory Limited!
